_comment: Canonical Claude Code hooks block for agent VMs. Single source of truth: base/09 composes ~/.claude/settings.json from it at provision time, and the-assistant docs/agents/scripts/update-agent.sh re-merges it onto existing boxes (base/09 is not re-run there). Commands are literal — $HOME/$PORTAL_URL/$AGENT_TOKEN/$AGENT_NAME expand when Claude runs the hook. The last-tool-use writer and the stop hook are gated to the JOB session via sb-session-id.sh (installed by base/14) so lingering/operator sessions cannot pollute job liveness or reporting (JOB-SIGNAL-ATTRIBUTION plan).
